info.title: DotnetClientGenerator
info.description: A tool for generating C# API clients from OpenAPI specifications

options.name: --input
options.description: This is the path to the OpenAPI specification file or URL

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path for the generated C# client

options.name: --class-name
options.description: Name of the generated client class [default: ApiClient]

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace for the generated client [default: GeneratedClient]

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch the input file for changes and regenerate automatically [default: False]

options.name: --generate-interface
options.description: Generate an interface for the client class [default: False]

options.name: --generate-model-interfaces
options.description: Generate interfaces for model classes [default: False]
